breaking.title: One Indian sailor killed, six wounded as Iranian missiles strike oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz
breaking.summary:
Missiles hit the Mombasa and Al Bahiyah in ​Omani territorial waters; fires damaged both tankers but crews brought them under
control

breaking.title: Iran War: US Military Death Count Rises To 14, Over 400 Injured
breaking.summary: The fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran has officially collapsed as both have resumed strikes.

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: U.S. strikes Iran for third night as Trump says deal still 'possible'
breaking.summary: “These strikes will continue imposing a heavy cost on Iranian forces and degrade their ability to attack innocent civilians and commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz,” U.S. Central Command said

breaking.title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
breaking.summary: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the Strait of Hormuz.

breaking.title: LeT, IS operatives among 34 killed in Khuzdar attack: BLA
breaking.summary: The Baloch Liberation Army claimed a major suicide attack on an ISIS-K commander's compound. This operation targeted a meeting coordinating efforts against the Baloch political movement. The BLA stated that 34 operatives, including ISIS and LeT members, were killed. The attack, executed by the Majeed Brigade, followed weeks of intelligence surveillance. This incident highlights alleged links between Pakistan's ISI and militant groups.

breaking.title: Rupee drops past 96 per dollar as oil prices climb on renewed US-Iran tensions
breaking.summary: The rupee weakened past 96 against the dollar on Tuesday. This decline occurred as oil prices saw a sharp increase this week. Tensions in the Middle East deepened, leading to fresh strikes between the US and Iran. Indian equities also faced pressure, with the Nifty 50 index experiencing losses. The rupee reached its weakest point since late May due to these combined factors.

breaking.title: Death toll from Bangkok bar fire rises to 30 as police probe safety lapses
breaking.summary: Survivors and first reporters reported doors being locked and the lack of signage marking emergency exits.

breaking.title: Tirupati Temple Employee Among 3 Arrested In Drug Bust
breaking.summary: Police are also investigating the wider drug supply network and whether others are involved.
